title: Deadfast 20300609 Decorative Fly Strips - 3 Pack,Blue
availability_text: Only 11 left in stock (more on the way).
features: Blast nozzle targets nests from 5 metres
description: From the manufacturer Deadfast Decorative Fly Strips Deadfast Decorative Fly Strips are long lasting chemical-free flying insect catchers. As well as long lasting protection, they have an attractive decorative design printed on the sticky strip. They are also easy to apply and perfect for use in kitchens Key Benefits Simple pull out design Chemical-free Long-lasting Decorative printed sticky strip to blend into the home 3 included Safe for use around children and pets For use indoors and outdoors How to use Step 1 Pull on the tab to release as much of the strip as needed. The strip can be rolled back into the canister if required. Step 2 Take one drawing pin and push it through the hole on the grey tab. Step 3 Hang the strip where flies are active by securing the pin to the surface. Step 4 Once flies have become stuck, dispose of the fly strip by removing the pin and throw into the household waste bin. Advice Note: Position fly strips out of areas where birds or bats may be flying or feeding FOR MORE HOW TO USE ADVICE VISIT DEADFAST.COM
